commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=aaf6f93e3b3157e0c1fe3d52e18d3d7ba7336ffa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Ollama host classification, remote-specific timeout and scheduler defaults in `extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts`, and a new `remote-host.test.ts` file with host/constant checks.

PR surface: Source +63, Tests +105. Total +168 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live remote Ollama reproduction was run for the linked issue. Yes for the PR defects: source inspection shows the patch excludes the reported private-LAN host path and changes inherited timeout behavior to fixed defaults.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the PR has blocking correctness findings and missing external real-behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(ollama): support remote Ollama hosts with extended timeouts
target.author: bowenluo718

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
